gazette: Official Gazette dated 16 October 2023 and numbered 32341
title: Additional customs duty rates increase on certain textiles, apparel and home textile products
bodyHtml:
Additional customs duty rates have been increased on certain textiles, ready-made Clothing (apparel), and home textile products. The increase in additional customs duty (ACD) rates ranges from 30 to 100 percent. These changes will take effect from November 15, 2023.

For yarn imports, ACD rates, which were previously 3 percent, 5 percent, and 8 percent, have been raised to 8 percent, 10 percent, and 13 percent, respectively. while the rate on fabrics has been increased from 20 percent to 27 percent. For ready-made clothing products, the rate has been raised from 30 percent to 39 percent, and for home textile products, the rate has been increased from 20 percent to 29 percent.

The list of increases, which covers more than 1200 Harmonized System Codes (HS Codes), can be reached via the following link.

https://www.resmigazete.gov.tr/eskiler/2023/10/20231016-6.pdf
